summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SportTix PWA. Most core functionality working correctly with excellent UI/UX. Fixed critical cart page bug. Identified IndexedDB persistence issue.

critical_bugs.issue: Data not persisting between browser sessions - onboarding needs to be completed each time, cart items don't persist
critical_bugs.impact: Users lose their progress and cart items when refreshing or revisiting the app

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing Label import causing 'Label is not defined' error

passed_tests: Home page loading with events, search, category filters
Event detail page (seat selection, quantity picker, add-ons)
Promo code application (FIRST10 working with -$25 discount)
Checkout page with payment methods (Credit Card, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay)
Profile page (username, city, sports preferences, dark mode, notifications)
Empty states for Tickets and Favorites pages
Proper styling with dark theme, electric blue primary, neon lime accent
Data-testid attributes present for all interactive elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix IndexedDB persistence issue - data should persist between browser sessions. Currently onboarding completion and cart items are lost on page refresh. Also test other promo codes (SAVE20, SPORT25) and complete payment success flow.
